---
title: "Using BribeR"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Using BribeR}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment  = "#>",
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 4
)

```
